services.name: App Service
services.description: Web application for document upload, status tracking, and search experience

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Serverless orchestrator for document processing workflow

services.name: Document Intelligence
services.description: Extracts OCR text, structure, and fields from uploaded documents

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.description: Generates document summaries and normalized insights from extracted text

services.name: Storage Account
services.description: Retains original document files and processed artifacts

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Stores document metadata, processing status, and summary references

services.name: Azure Cognitive Search
services.description: Indexes extracted content and summaries for fast retrieval

services.name: Microsoft Entra ID
services.description: Authenticates users accessing the document processing application

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects pipeline metrics and traces from the processing layer

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and analyzes operational logs for troubleshooting and audit

connections.label: Authenticate document processing users and issue access tokens
Submit uploaded document and processing options for orchestration
Persist original document for durable retention before analysis
Send retained document for OCR and structured field extraction
Return extracted text, tables, and key-value content to workflow
Provide extracted text for summarization and insight generation
Return concise summary and normalized document insights
Write metadata, summary, retention URI, and processing status record
Push extracted content and summary into searchable index
Execute user search queries and retrieve ranked document matches
Fetch document metadata and processing status for application views
Emit processing metrics, failures, and execution traces
Route aggregated telemetry for retention and investigation

workflow.description: A user signs in to the web application and starts a new document submission session.
The application sends the uploaded file to the orchestration layer, which stores the original document for long-term retention.
The orchestration layer submits the retained document to Document Intelligence and receives OCR text and structured extraction results.
The extracted text is sent to Azure OpenAI to generate a concise summary and normalized insights for downstream use.
The orchestration layer saves metadata, status, summary, and storage references in Cosmos DB.
The orchestration layer publishes extracted content and summaries into Azure Cognitive Search for retrieval.
Users query the application, which retrieves ranked search hits from Cognitive Search and metadata from Cosmos DB.
Processing metrics and traces are emitted from the workflow and stored for operational monitoring and troubleshooting.

metadata.prompt: An intelligent document processing pipeline with Azure AI Document Intelligence for OCR, Azure OpenAI for summarization, Cognitive Search for indexing, Cosmos DB for metadata, and Blob Storage for document retention
